'''Farazzish''' was a [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] who was exiled to the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Captivity]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Farazzish fell in with the group led by the former [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Dedelin]], and was eventually rescued by a team from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Farazzish was only one of two senators still surviving on the planet, the other being [[Templeton]], and had been imprisoned before the Alliance had flourished. News of an organized resistance to the Empire excited the former Senator.

==Appearances==
